scripts.dev: concurrently -n front,back -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:front" "npm run dev:back"
scripts.build: cd back && ./gradlew bootJar -x test && npm run build -w front
scripts.start: concurrently -n front,back -c cyan,magenta "npm run start -w front" "cd back && java -jar build/libs/dasi-golmok-api.jar"
scripts.db:reset: cd back && docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
